gist.headline: Sentinel on duty
gist.blurb: Skills-Sentinel-scan just landed in our Dev Tools. It's a Dockerized security scanner that sniffs out malicious patterns and permission overreach in AI skills, keeping the hive safe.
gist.summary: Added Skills-Sentinel-scan to the Dev Tools ecosystem, providing a Dockerized security scanner with a web UI for detecting risks in AI skills and agents.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily scan their AI agents and skills for malicious patterns, supply chain risks, and permission overreach.
gist.visual_concept: Security and scanning metaphor. Polly the bee acting as an inspector or sentinel, examining code or AI agents for vulnerabilities. A shield or magnifying glass represents the scanning process.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny detective hat, holding a glowing magnifying glass over a chunky retro terminal displaying code. A small pixelated shield icon glows nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
